summary: Large Old Kongo stage decompilation PR centered on src/melee/gr/groldkongo.c. It replaced several placeholder declarations with C for grOldKongo_80210454 and grOldKongo_80210650, significantly improved grOldKongo_8020F888 and grOldKongo_802100FC, expanded the Old Kongo data/config struct layout, and tightened groldkongo.h prototypes. The decomp.dev report recorded 5 new matches and +800 matched code bytes, with grOldKongo_80210454, grOldKongo_80210650, .sdata2, .sdata, and grOldKongo_8021005C reaching 100%. Many other touched files are formatting/style cleanups rather than semantic changes.

key_files.role: Main target; added most code, expanded Old Kongo parameter struct, manually matched stage callback setup, implemented/improved Old Kongo behavior functions.
Updated prototypes for newly typed functions grOldKongo_80210454 and grOldKongo_80210650.
Pointer-star and indentation formatting around an inline Ground_GetStageGObj helper.
Pointer-star and indentation formatting around an inline GET_GROUND substitute.
Line-wrap formatting cleanup in file/sector calculation.

what_changed: Added includes in groldkongo.c for placeholder.h, baselib/debug.h, camera, efsync, ftlib, and ftCo_BarrelWait to support the new Old Kongo logic.
Expanded the static grOk_804D6A90 data layout from mostly byte padding into named offset fields including f32, s16, and s32 members up through x6C.
Added static grOk_803B8408 as a 9-word local template/config structure used when constructing barrel/wait interaction parameters.

Replaced a call to Ground_SetupStageCallbacks in grOldKongo_8020F52C with explicit callback setup: clears Ground callbacks, sets GX link with grDisplay_801C5DB0, installs callback3, calls callback0, and sets callback2 as an HSD_GObj proc when present.

Implemented a large version of grOldKongo_8020F888 for Old Kongo stage rotation/animation/state behavior, including DegToRad and M_TAU constants, random timer ranges, rotation clamping/wrapping, grAnime calls, material changes, and fighter barrel/wait handoff logic.

Implemented grOldKongo_802100FC, handling an animated object timer, random Y placement, camera bounds via Camera_800307D0, left/right spawn positioning, visibility flags, and reset timer randomization.

Implemented grOldKongo_80210454 as an s32-returning proximity trigger between the ground object and a fighter object, using Ground_801C4DA0, ftLib_80086644, distance-squared comparison, efSync_Spawn, ftLib_80086C18, grAnime_801C7FF8, and grMaterial_801C9604.
Implemented grOldKongo_80210650 as an f32-returning weighted random angle selector over eight s16 weight fields, returning discrete radian values from 2.3561945f down to -3.1415927f.
Updated groldkongo.h declarations from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures: s32 grOldKongo_80210454(HSD_GObj*, HSD_GObj*) and f32 grOldKongo_80210650(void).
Applied style-only formatting changes across fighter, ground, item, lb, menu, and baselib files, especially pointer-star placement, long-line wrapping, empty block formatting, and for-loop spacing.
smart_moves: Used concrete struct offsets in grOk_804D6A90 instead of opaque padding, enabling later Old Kongo functions to consume stage parameters by offset and improving data-section matching.
Kept unknown field names offset-based, such as x1C, x2C, x6C, rather than over-naming behavior that is not fully understood.

Typed header prototypes only where the implementation evidence was strong: grOldKongo_80210454 returns s32 and takes two HSD_GObj pointers, while grOldKongo_80210650 returns f32 and takes no parameters.
Used distance-squared comparison in grOldKongo_80210454, avoiding a square-root and matching typical game-code proximity checks.
Modeled random integer ranges defensively with zero-range checks before HSD_Randi, a recurring matching pattern visible in multiple new Old Kongo blocks.
Preserved matching-sensitive constants directly, including 0.017453292F, 6.283185307179586, 57.29578f, and exact radian angle constants.
Manually expanded Ground_SetupStageCallbacks in grOldKongo_8020F52C, likely because the direct helper call did not match this function's generated code shape.

Used existing union views in Ground->gv, including oldkongo, arwing, castle8, castle11, castle2, and unk fields, to access the same offsets required by the target assembly without introducing a new complete Ground union layout in this PR.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, matching may require manually spelling out common helper behavior rather than calling the helper if the original code inlined or arranged callback setup differently.
When decompiling data-driven stage behavior, first expand the stage parameter struct enough to expose every consumed offset; this can unlock .sdata/.sdata2 and function matches together.
Weighted random selection can match cleanly as a cascade of subtract-and-test blocks against individual s16 weights, especially when the returned values are fixed radian constants.
Preserve exact float literal forms and casts around tau/radian wrapping; small differences in f32/f64 conversion can affect matching.
For large partially matched state machines, offset-based field names are acceptable and safer than speculative semantic names until the stage behavior is fully understood.
Unrelated formatting churn should be recognized separately from semantic decomp work; most non-groldkongo files in this PR appear to be style-only cleanup.
Use decomp.dev bot output as an objective check: this PR improved groldkongo_8020F888 to 91.05% and grOldKongo_802100FC to 97.57%, while fully matching grOldKongo_80210454 and grOldKongo_80210650.
naming_conventions: Old Kongo stage symbols use the grOldKongo_802xxxxx address-based naming convention.
Static Old Kongo data symbols use the grOk_ prefix, e.g. grOk_804D6A90, grOk_803E658C, and grOk_803B8408.
Unknown struct fields remain offset-based, such as x0, x1C, x2C, xC4, xD8, and x6C.
Function prototypes in headers should replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with exact types once inferred from implementation and call sites.
Project style places pointer stars next to the type, e.g. Fighter* fp, Ground_GObj* gobj, HSD_JObj* jobj.
Long calls and prototypes are wrapped over multiple lines with aligned continuation indentation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Introduced DegToRad(a) as ((a) * 0.017453292F) and M_TAU as 6.283185307179586 to match repeated angle conversion and wrap logic.
Used explicit f64 casts in tau wrapping expressions, e.g. subtracting or adding M_TAU before storing back to f32.
Used goto labels in grOldKongo_8020F888 and grOldKongo_80210454 to reproduce branch structure.
Used zero-range guards before HSD_Randi(range), matching compiler output for random ranges where min and max can be equal.
Copied static grOk_803B8408 fields to stack locals before overwriting them with runtime values, preserving the stack/data movement pattern in the barrel interaction code.
Used direct JObj operations such as HSD_JObjSetRotationZ, HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z, HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll, and HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll to reflect target stage-object behavior.
Relied on GET_GROUND and GET_JOBJ macros in implemented stage functions where their expansion matched the desired object access.
Changed OSReport to use __FILE__ in grOldKongo_8020F52C while preserving the hard-coded line number 0xD5.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported +0.02% matched code (+800 bytes) and +0.01% matched data (+112 bytes) for GALE01.
review_feedback.details: New 100% matches: grOldKongo_80210454 (+344 bytes), grOldKongo_80210650 (+304 bytes), groldkongo .sdata2 (+74), .sdata (+24), and grOldKongo_8021005C (+1). Improved unmatched items: grOldKongo_8020F888 to 91.05%, grOldKongo_802100FC to 97.57%, and .data to 36.33%.

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish matching grOldKongo_8020F888 from 91.05% to 100%.
Find later PRs that finish matching grOldKongo_802100FC from 97.57% to 100%.
Search for grOk_804D6A90 field renames or a named Old Kongo attributes struct.
Search for reuse of the weighted random angle cascade from grOldKongo_80210650 in other stage files.
Search for other PRs manually expanding Ground_SetupStageCallbacks for matching.
